zh.Roskilde: 丹麥奧本哈福哥本哈根
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mogens Lagesen Galt於大約1350年出生在丹麥霍爾ae可奧德斯泰德時，他的父親Lage Ebbesen Galt32歲，母親Mrs. Lage Galt32歲。他於大約1379年與Mrs. Mogens Galt結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年在丹麥奧本哈福奧姆洛斯吉爾德 多姆恩洛斯吉爾德享年61歲，埋葬在丹麥奧本哈福哥本哈根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mogens Lagesen Galt于大约1350年出生在丹麦霍爾ae可奧德斯泰德时，他的父亲Lage Ebbesen Galt32岁，母亲Mrs. Lage Galt32岁。他于大约1379年与Mrs. Mogens Galt结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年在丹麦奧本哈福奧姆洛斯吉爾德 多姆恩洛斯吉爾德享年61岁，埋葬在丹麦奧本哈福哥本哈根。

nameMeanings.name: Lagesen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian Lagesen: patronymic from Lage, a personal name meaning ‘friend’, which is of the same origin as -lagi in Old Norse félagi ‘comrade, partner’.
Americanized form (and a very rare Swedish variant) of Lagesson, a rare Swedish cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Galt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of Gall , with excrescent -t.
English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English galte, gaute, gault ‘boar, hog’ (Old Norse gǫltr, galte), denoting someone thought to resemble the animal in appearance or character.

variants.name: Gault
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire), Irish (Antrim and Derry), and English: variant of   Galt  .
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Waldo, from wald ‘power, authority’.
French: habitational name from any of the places called Le Gault (for example in Loir-et-Cher and Eure-et-Loir), named with ancient Germanic walthu- ‘wood, forest’. Compare Legault .

variants.name: Gaut
meanings: In some cases possibly also French: variant of   Gault  .

variants.name: Gall
meanings: Scottish, Welsh, and Irish: nickname from Celtic gall ‘foreigner, stranger’, a word found in Irish, Gaelic, and Breton. In the Scottish Highlands the Gaelic term gall was applied to people from the English-speaking lowlands and to Scandinavians; in Ireland the same term was applied to settlers who arrived from Wales and England in the wake of the Anglo-Norman invasion of the 12th century. This surname is also found at an early date in Lincolnshire, where it apparently has a Breton origin (compare 4 below and Legall ), having been introduced by Breton followers of the Norman Conquerors.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gale  .

French, German, Danish, Polish, and Czech; Slovak (mainly Gáll); Hungarian (Gáll): from the Latin personal name Gallus, originally a Roman surname meaning ‘Gaul’ or ‘rooster’ (see Gallo 2). The name was widespread in Europe during the Middle Ages, in central Europe largelly due to the cult of a 7th-century Irish monk and missionary, Saint Gall, whose name, Latinized as Gallus, is presumably of Celtic origin (see 1 above). Among other things, Saint Gall established a Christian settlement to the south of Lake Constance, which became the monastery later known as St. Gallen. The Latin(ized) name Gallus was taken into Czech as Havel , into Polish as Gaweł (see Gawel ), into Slovak and Hungarian as Gál (see Gal ), and into Slovenian and Croatian as Gal .

variants.name: Gatt
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire): variant of Galt . An alternative derivation from Older Scots gate, gait, gaet, get(t) (Old Norse gata) ‘way, road, path; street’ (see Gates ) is theoretically possible, but there is no evidence to link this to any of the historical bearers of the name in the British Isles.
South German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed from the same root as the Middle High German word gate ‘companion, compatible person’.

nameMeanings.name: Mogens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: The Union of Kalmar unites Denmark, Sweden and Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Mogens Lagesen Galt was born about 1350, in Søndersted, Holbæk, Denmark, his father, Lage Ebbesen Galt, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. Lage Galt, was 32. He married Mrs. Mogens Galt about 1379. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1410, in Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Denmark, at the age of 61, and was buried in Copenhagen, København, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mogens Lagesen Galt est né environ 1350, à Søndersted, Holbæk, Danemark, son père, Lage Ebbesen Galt, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Lage Galt, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Mogens Galt environ 1379. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1410, à Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Danemark, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Copenhague, København, Danemark.

de.Roskilde, Kobenhavn, Denmark: Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dänemark
de.lifeSummary: Als Mogens Lagesen Galt um 1350 in Søndersted, Holbæk, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lage Ebbesen Galt 32 und seine Mutter Mrs. Lage Galt 32. Er hat um 1379 Mrs. Mogens Galt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1410 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dänemark und wurde in Kopenhagen, København, Dänemark begraben.

Lui sposato Mrs. Mogens Galt circa 1379. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1410, nel Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Danimarca, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a København, København, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Mogens Lagesen Galtが約1350年にデンマークホールブaeクスoンダーステドで生まれた時，父Lage Ebbesen Galtは32歳，母Mrs. Lage Galtは32歳であった。約1379年にMrs. Mogens Galtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1410年にデンマーククoベンハヴンスoンメロスキルド ドムソグンロスキルドで61歳で死去し，デンマーククoベンハヴンクoベンハヴンにて埋葬された。

ko.Roskilde, Kobenhavn, Denmark: 덴마크 ko벤하브 스o 로스킬드 돔소그 로스킬드
ko.lifeSummary: Mogens Lagesen Galt(이)가 대략 1350년 덴마크 홀브ae크 스o더스테드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lage Ebbesen Galt(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Lage Galt(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1379년 Mrs. Mogens Galt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 덴마크 ko벤하브 스o 로스킬드 돔소그 로스킬드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 ko벤하브 코펜하겐에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mogens Lagesen Galt родился около 1350 г. в местности сoндирстед, холбaeк, Дания, его отцу по имени Lage Ebbesen Galt было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Lage Galt, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Mogens Galt около 1379 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1410 г. в местности роскаилд, роскаилд домсогн, сoмм, кoбенавн, Дания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности Копенгаген, кoбенавн, Дания.
